description: Developer-friendly MCP server bridging Kafka and Pulsar protocols—built with ❤️ by StreamNative for an agentic, streaming-first future.

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-mh63-6h87-95cp in github.com/golang-jwt/jwt@3.2.1+incompatible
findings.recommendation: Upgrade github.com/golang-jwt/jwt to a version that resolves GHSA-mh63-6h87-95cp. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-mh63-6h87-95cp for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
